# {{PROJECT_DISPLAY_NAME}}

Backend API starter generated with LaunchStack CLI.

## Requirements

Node.js 20 or newer.

## Setup

Install dependencies:

    npm install

Copy the environment example:

    cp .env.example .env

Start development mode:

    npm run dev

Run type checking:

    npm run typecheck

Build the project:

    npm run build

## Generated by

LaunchStack CLI

https://www.npmjs.com/package/launchstack-cli
